For the purpose of illustrating the possibilities of today's dental procedures, this web site may include models and/or generic before and after smile case examples. These examples do not represent a certainty of case performance for any single individual. Individual before and after results will vary. Patients should consult with their dentist before making a final decision. All patient information is private & protected by our office unless otherwise approved by the patient. Melissa E. texts.full_text: Fantasy Stretch Run** Mathematical models can help you make crucial decisions at this stage and avoid the pitfalls that plague many a fantasy manager late in their season. Take for example year's Week 4, when Philip Rivers put up an performance against the Titans - he threw two interceptions with no touchdowns! But if our model had been consulted beforehand (it boasts accuracy of over *93%* compared to league projections), you would have known than starting him that week. This week, we have some players that others might not be keying on that can help you out right away. Want to find out who they are? Read on, my friend. Better than Andrew Luck. Better than Matthew Stafford. Better than Matt Ryan. Yeah, we're a excited about
